problem id: c5872355
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  10001011 -> 10010010
  11010101 -> 01100101
  00011101 -> 11010111
  00000101 -> 01010001
  01111101 -> 11001111
  10010110 -> 01000101
  00101110 -> 11101011
  00000000 -> 00000000
  10111111 -> 11011111
  01011000 -> 10010110

query: 11100110
predicted answer: 01011001
